target: Why are you here, Shinpei!? Did you come back!?
(The only one of its kind in the world, Ushio's memento... this thing is wearing it...!!)
Ushio is dead...!! The... the day before yesterday...
You're... not her... There's no way you're Ushio!!
Huh!? What are you... talking about...
But I'm alive, see? Look! I'm right here!?
(This is a Shadow!! There's no mistake about that!!)
Y-You... Do you not remember... what happened to you!?
You don't know...? W-What happened before you came here...
Really... I only remember that it was painful...
Inside... the water... Everything in front of me... slowly went dark--
I see... I really did die...!!
Then, what am I...? A g-ghost...?
(Th-This thing... Does she really think she's Ushio!? What is going on--)
The very last thing I thought was... I wanted to see you one more time...
That I wanted to see Shinpei...!!
Maybe that's why I was able to come back...?
(That voice... those gestures... Stop it... what the hell is this...!!)
(With this, it's almost like... Ushio really has come back.)
You know... there's something I wanted to tell you if I ever got to see you again.
(Wh-What did she... just say? L-Like!? What is that supposed to mean!?)
Y-You... wha...!! What are you saying!?
D-Did dying make you go crazy or something!!!!
It's just... My head is all fuzzy...
(D-Don't be fooled!! Look at the big picture, me!)
(Ushio was put in her coffin the day before yesterday. And the three of us, Alain, Mio, and I-- we pushed the button for the cremation.)
(Ushio turned to ash. She's no longer in this world.)
(Pretending to be Ushio... What the hell is your goal!?)
I'd like to ask you that...
When you die... aren't you supposed to go to God's place...?
W-What is your goal!? What are you guys trying to do!?
Huh...? ...What do I... want to do--
Shinpei... those fireworks... Could today be the 24th...!?
There was something I wanted to do!!
I want to go to the festival with Shinpei!!
